offer: For construction contractors processing 5–10 projects/month, inefficient material ordering causes late orders. We automate material ordering and scheduling instead of manual tracking and ordering processes.
problem: Inefficient material ordering and scheduling from construction plans.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach to construction contractors with demo video
Community forums where contractors share tools
try_it: Let users try material ordering interface on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video of manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
